description_long: This object consists of three pumpkins, two of which are hollowed out and one that is intact. The largest pumpkin is whole, with a smooth, ribbed orange surface and a dark, twisted stem. The other two pumpkins are carved: one features a menacing, jagged face with sharp eyes and a wide, toothy grin, while the other is smaller and has a simple open top. The carved pumpkins have visible interior textures resembling the fibrous inside of a real pumpkin, and their lids are detached and placed nearby. The surfaces are matte with a slightly rough texture, and the coloration is predominantly orange with some brown and black accents on the stems. The overall appearance suggests these pumpkins are intended as Halloween decorations, possibly for display in an urban outdoor setting.
description: A group of three pumpkins, including one intact and two hollowed, with one featuring a carved, menacing face and detached lids. The surfaces are ribbed, matte orange with dark stems, and the interiors are visible in the carved pumpkins.
description_view_0: This view shows the largest intact pumpkin with a visible stem and ribbed surface, and part of a hollowed pumpkin with an open top.
description_view_1: The front of the carved pumpkin is visible, displaying a jagged, menacing face with sharp eyes and a wide mouth; the detached lids and hollow interiors are also prominent.
description_view_2: The open tops of the two hollowed pumpkins are clearly visible, along with the detached lids placed on the ground.
description_view_3: The intact pumpkin is most prominent, with the two hollowed pumpkins and their interiors visible behind it.
attribute_carving_pattern: The largest carved pumpkin features a traditional Halloween face with jagged, triangular eyes, a pointed nose, and a wide, toothy grin. The style is expressive and menacing, with sharp, angular cutouts and exaggerated features. The other hollowed pumpkin has a simple open top with no facial features.
